narrative:
Deerfield Twp V (precinct in Warren County) has 1,182 registered voters, with 64.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
